meta.title: Running Llama 2 on Windows or Mac with an Intel chip
meta.description:
How to install and run a Llama 2 language model (LLM) on a Mac with an Intel chip, or on Windows.

Installation Guides: https://github.com/TrelisResearch/install-guides

Jupyter Notebook (with automated Mac install), paid: https://buy.stripe.com/dR65l6f4p95V7AI6oA

Free Google Colab Notebook (if you don't have an M1/M2 Mac): https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1u8x41Jx8WWtI-nzHOgqTxkS3Q_lcjaSX?usp=sharing

Google Colab Fine Tuning Notebook: https://colab.research.google.com/drive/1uMSS1o_8YOPyG1X_4k6ENEE3kJfBGGhH?usp=sharing

0:00 Setting Expectations
2:10 Hardware Recommendations
3:30 Windows Installation Guide
5:57 Installing on Mac with an Intel Chip
